claim_bullets.bullet_text: Monster data is written in the following format, including attributes like monster level, rarity, agility, movement speed, number, frequency, intellect, reaction, attack points, strike points, evasion points, defense points, life points/resistance, mental points/resistance, special abilities, habitat, perception, and languages (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.172-175).

Monster level corresponds to a character's adventurer level and represents the general strength of that monster, with higher scores indicating greater strength (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.172-175).
Intellect indicates the monster's degree of intellect, with types ranging from none to very high, each with specific characteristics (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.172-175).

source_record_text: This section explains how to read the monster catalog in the Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.
